calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Melanie Dunbar mother of minor present in court. Donnell Mack II., father of minor present in court.
Petitioner worn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Court overruled the father's objections to the proposed change of name.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Richard Donovan Ford to Donovan Richard Dunbar Mack.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Reset To Aug-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Reset To Jul-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
